original:
Rao holds a finger to his cheek for a moment, thinking.

"It could be earned," he says. "But that's up to you."
translated:
Rao pose un doigt sur sa joue un instant, pensif.

"Ca pourrait se meriter," dit-il. "Mais c'est a vous de voir."

original:
"What admirable loyalty! How Reynard earns it, I've never understood. I must study his leadership closely, for I obviously have much to learn." The sarcasm runs thick.

Rao sits back, face falling into shadow.
translated:
"Quelle admirable loyaute ! Comment Reynard la merite, je ne l'ai jamais compris. Je dois etudier son leadership de pres, car j'ai manifestement beaucoup a apprendre." Le sarcasme coule a flots.

Rao se cale dans son siege, le visage tombant dans l'ombre.

original:
"Seeing as you're a full, albeit junior, member of the Persean League... we can't have you in a position of divided loyalty, can we."

He produces a little shrug.

"But perhaps," he looks aside. "We might have a mutual friend on Kazeron?"
translated:
"Etant donne que vous etes un membre a part entiere, bien que subalterne, de la Ligue Perseenne... nous ne pouvons pas vous mettre dans une position de loyaute divisee, n'est-ce pas."

Il fait un petit haussement d'epaules.

"Mais peut-etre," il regarde de cote. "Aurions-nous un ami commun sur Kazeron ?"

original: "I understand. Keeping with his trust is more important than serving that goal." He leans back, "It's interesting."
translated: "Je comprends. Garder sa confiance est plus important que de servir cet objectif." Il se cale dans son siege, "C'est interessant."

option_line: rao_pitchYaribayMum2a:"Speculate if you like, I have nothing to say."
original: Speculate if you like, I have nothing to say.
translated: Speculez si vous voulez, je n'ai rien a dire.

original: Rao raises an eyebrow, his expression amused.
translated: Rao hausse un sourcil, l'air amuse.

original:
He smiles coyly, leaving your statement deliberately unanswered.

"It is possible our work together would serve certain common goals."
translated:
Il sourit d'un air entendu, laissant deliberement votre declaration sans reponse.

"Il est possible que notre collaboration serve certains objectifs communs."

option_line: rao_pitchNopeGentle:"Thank you for the offer, but perhaps not just now."
original: Thank you for the offer, but perhaps not just now.
translated: Merci pour l'offre, mais peut-etre pas pour le moment.

original:
"The Hegemony is no stranger to making common cause with the Church of Galactic Redemption..." He makes a half-shrug.

"I suppose," he says slowly, "If you can put up with me, I can deal with your god-bothering."
translated:
"L'Hegemonie n'est pas etrangere a l'idee de faire cause commune avec l'Eglise de la Redemption Galactique..." Il fait un demi-haussement d'epaules.

"Je suppose," dit-il lentement, "que si vous pouvez me supporter, je peux faire avec vos bondieuseries."

option_line: rao_pitchNopeGentle:"Thank you for the offer, but perhaps not just now."
original: Thank you for the offer, but perhaps not just now.
translated: Merci pour l'offre, mais peut-etre pas pour le moment.
